title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) - Crop Insurance

sections.content: Crop insurance at low premium: Kharif 2%, Rabi 1.5%, Commercial/horticulture 5% of sum insured. Government pays remaining premium. Covers: natural calamities, pests, diseases, post-harvest losses (14 days), localized calamities (hailstorm, landslide, flood), prevented sowing. Covers all crops including paddy, wheat, cotton, pulses, oilseeds.

Loanee farmers: auto-enrolled via bank (can opt out). Non-loanee: apply through bank/CSC/insurance company portal/pmfby.gov.in or Crop Insurance App. Need: Aadhaar, bank account, land records (khatauni/lease), sowing certificate from patwari/agriculture officer. Deadline: before sowing season cutoff date.

Report crop loss within 72 hours via Crop Insurance App/portal/bank/insurance company/toll-free 14447. Government conducts Crop Cutting Experiments (CCE) at mandal/block level. If yield below threshold (based on 7-year average), claim auto-triggered for entire area. Individual claim: field inspection by insurance company. Payment via DBT within 2 months of CCE data.

Check at pmfby.gov.in > Application Status or Crop Insurance App. Enter: application number or Aadhaar or mobile. Shows: policy details, premium paid, claim status, payout amount. Season-wise and crop-wise details available.
